title: Diagram Block payload
description: svg is the sanitised SVG stored INLINE (stakeholder-ratified 2026-07-18): byte-exact review-gate integrity — what the Teacher approved is frozen in the Published Version, no swappable asset path for diagrams. The AD-13 sanitisation gate runs before any persist; the 200 kB per-diagram budget is checked by pipeline validators, not schema. altText/longDescription per the text-alternative contract.
